name: purmemo-mcp
description: Persistent AI memory + workflows for Claude. Save conversations, recall context, and run memory-powered workflows across every session.
long_description:
pūrmemo gives Claude a memory that persists across sessions and structured workflows powered by your memory.

**What it does:**
- **Save** — Store conversations as living documents that update over time
- **Recall** — Search and surface relevant memories when you need them
- **Workflows** — Run 15+ memory-powered workflows (PRD, debug, sprint, growth, etc.) pre-loaded with your context
- **Auto-capture** — Works silently in the background, capturing every session
- **Cross-platform** — Memories from Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Chrome extension, and more — all in one place

**Tools included:**
- `save_conversation` — Save any conversation to your memory
- `save_artifact` — Save artifacts (research reports, tables, specs) linked to conversations
- `recall_memories` — Search your memory with natural language
- `get_memory_details` — Retrieve a full conversation by ID
- `discover_related_conversations` — Find related memories across all platforms
- `get_user_context` — View memory stats and recent activity
- `run_workflow` — Run memory-powered workflows (PRD, debug, sprint, etc.)
- `list_workflows` — Browse all available workflows by category
- `share_memory` — Share a memory publicly with a shareable link
- `recall_public` — Search publicly shared memories from all users
- `get_public_memory` — Retrieve a publicly shared memory by ID
- `report_memory` — Report inappropriate or harmful public memories

api_key.title: pūrmemo API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from app.purmemo.ai. Go to Settings → API Keys to generate one.
